invariants: The recipe pins one SkillCatalogV1 version.
User-selected skills remain separate from automatic and internal resolved skills.
Every selected feed record resolves in the declared ingredient category.
ingredient_first identifies a selected primary ingredient.
Trade history has one explicit permitted use and respects cutoff and reuse rights.
Every output channel and format has a registered renderer.
Resolved skills include every mandatory evidence and governance dependency.
A saved recipe revision is reproducible and contains no credentials.
